home.tagline: Developer utilities, all in one place
home.sub: All tools run entirely in your browser. Zero data sent to any server.
home.footer: Built for developers · Open source · No tracking

json.title: JSON Formatter
json.desc: Format, minify, and validate JSON with syntax highlighting.

base64.title: Base64
base64.desc: Encode and decode Base64 strings and files instantly.

url.title: URL Encoder
url.desc: Encode/decode URL components and full URIs.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.desc: Decode JWT tokens, inspect header & payload, check expiry.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back, live counter.

json.title: JSON Formatter
json.desc: Format, minify, and validate JSON. All processing happens in your browser.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64.desc: Encode plain text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text. UTF-8 safe.
base64.inputPlaceholder: Enter text to encode, or Base64 to decode...

url.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
url.desc: Encode or decode URL components and full URIs.
url.componentHint: → Encodes all special chars including :/?#[]@!$&'()*+,;= — use for query param values
url.fullHint: → Preserves URI structure chars (:/?#[]@) — use for complete URLs

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.desc: Decode JSON Web Tokens — inspect header, payload, and check expiry. Signature is NOT verified.
jwt.sigNote: ⚠ Signature is displayed but NOT cryptographically verified.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa.

bookmark.title: Bookmark this!
bookmark.alertMsg: Press Ctrl+D (or Cmd+D on Mac) to bookmark this page!
